name: Island Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Jamaican spice rub or Cajun spice mix
2 cups chopped fresh or canned pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork chops on wax paper.
2. In a small dish, combine the spice rub and salt.
3. Reserve 3/4 teaspoon of the spice mixture for salsa.
4. Rub the remaining spice mixture over the pork chops.
5. Heat an ovenproof skillet over medium heat. Coat the pan with nonstick cooking spray.
6. Add the pork chops to the skillet; cook for 4 minutes, until browned and turning once.
7. Place the pork chops in a preheated 425°F (220°C) oven. Bake for 10 minutes, until no longer pink.
8. Meanwhile, prepare the salsa by rinsing the onion in a sieve under running water and draining well.
9. In a bowl, combine the onion, pineapple, parsley, lime juice, and reserved spice mixture.
10. Serve with pork.
